Fix SRC-BUG-006 (attempt 1/3): QA: REQ-003 — The requirement REQ-003 specifies scalability for .

Acceptance test gap for REQ-003: Scalability for 1000+ Elements

Reason: The requirement REQ-003 specifies scalability for 1000+ elements, which is a non-functional requirement related to performance, architecture, and capacity. The provided code only contains basic package initialization, version info, and a CLI entry point. There is no implementation of any data structures, algorithms, load testing, configuration for scaling, or any code that demonstrates or supports handling 1000+ elements. The code is essentially a skeleton with no scalability-related logic whatsoever.

Severity: high

ACTION: Implement REQ-003 according to the spec.

PROJECT: /Users/dmitry/Documents/Droid/spec-editor2
Read FILES TO CHECK mentioned above before making changes.
Use bash to run: python -m pytest tests/ -q to verify fixes.
